title: Cryptool taps into a 2,000-strong crypto executives network
content_html:
Cryptool has signed a partnership with a network of more than 2,000 crypto C-level executives, opening up a direct line to operators who have built and scaled the projects shaping the industry.

The collaboration brings four things to the table:

  • Access to the network itself, with a clear path to senior introductions
  • Advisory on product development, growth strategy and go-to-market
  • Curated connections with potential partners, customers and investors
  • Hands-on fundraising support from people who have run the process themselves

For the projects fundraising on Cryptool, the partnership is a quiet but significant advantage: a layer of senior advice that most early-stage teams do not get to access.
author: Cryptool
